zh.Brackley, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利
zh.Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, Eng: 英國諾薩普頓史爾索普 沃特維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Holand於大約1347年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親Robert de Holand IV38歲，母親Margery Heaton35歲。他於1376年與Elizabeth de Greene在英國諾薩普頓史爾索普 沃特維爾結婚。他去世於大約1413年享年68歲。

zh-hans.Brackley, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利
zh-hans.Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, Eng: 英国諾薩普頓史爾索普 沃特維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Holand于大约1347年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲Robert de Holand IV38岁，母亲Margery Heaton35岁。他于1376年与Elizabeth de Greene在英国諾薩普頓史爾索普 沃特維爾结婚。他去世于大约1413年享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Holand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Holland
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Holand was born about 1347, in Northamptonshire, England, his father, Robert de Holand IV, was 38 and his mother, Margery Heaton, was 35. He married Elizabeth de Greene in 1376, in Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, England. He died about 1413, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Holand est né environ 1347, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Holand IV, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margery Heaton, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Greene en 1376, à Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé environ 1413, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Holand um 1347 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Holand IV 38 und seine Mutter Margery Heaton 35. Er hat 1376 in Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, England Elizabeth de Greene geheiratet. Er starb um 1413 im Alter von 68 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Holand è nato il circa 1347 nel Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Holand IV, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Margery Heaton, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Greene nel 1376, nel Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, England. Morì circa 1413, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Holandが約1347年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Holand IVは38歳，母Margery Heatonは35歳であった。1376年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアソルペ ワテルヴィルでElizabeth de Greeneと結婚した。彼は約1413年に68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Holand(이)가 대략 1347년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Holand IV(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Heaton(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1376년 영국 노르섬프토실르 소 왓르빌에서 Elizabeth de Greene(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 대략 1413년 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1347–about 1413: tany ho any amin'ny 1347–tany ho any amin'ny 1413

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Holand nasceu aproximadamente 1347, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Holand IV, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margery Heaton, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Greene em 1376, em Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1413, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Holand родился около 1347 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Holand IV было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Heaton, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Greene в 1376 г. в местности таурп вэитирвилл, нортамптоншир, Англия. Он умер около 1413 г. в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Holand nació aproximadamente 1347, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Holand IV, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margery Heaton, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Greene en 1376, en Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Murió aproximadamente 1413, a la edad de 68 años.
